summary:
The tests have passed successfully! Here's the summary of what I did:

1. Identified that Nginx was returning 502 Bad Gateway for `/api/data`
2. Discovered the Nginx configuration was forwarding requests to port 5001
3. Verified the Flask app was running on port 5000
4. Fixed the Nginx configuration by changing the port from 5001 to 5000
5. Reloaded Nginx and confirmed the fix works

The problem was a port mismatch in the Nginx configuration where it was trying to proxy requests to port 5001 instead of the Flask app's actual port 5000. This configuration error caused Nginx to return 502 errors when trying to access the `/api/data` endpoint.
